next_steps: Perform leptospirosis polymerase chain reaction (PCR) on serum and urine
Perform microscopic agglutination test (MAT) for Leptospira serovars
Obtain peripheral blood smear to evaluate for intraerythrocytic parasites (Babesia)
Send serum for Borrelia burgdorferi and Anaplasma phagocytophilum PCR/serology
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics including doxycycline for spirochetal and tick-borne coverage
Monitor renal function for potential requirement of renal replacement therapy
Obtain bronchoalveolar lavage for culture and multiplex respiratory PCR if pulmonary status worsens
Provide supportive care including hemodynamic support and oxygen supplementation

differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired pneumonia with sepsis and multiorgan dysfunction
next_steps: Perform Leptospira PCR on serum and urine
Obtain peripheral blood smear for Babesia
Order viral hepatitis panel (HAV, HBV, HCV) and CMV/EBV serologies
Review history of domestic dog's health status and potential for urine exposure
Monitor serial organ function, including renal panel, bilirubin, and coagulation studies
Consider Bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) with multiplex respiratory PCR and atypical pathogen cultures if pulmonary status does not improve
